title: Minimum Number of Days to Eat N Oranges
titleCn: 吃掉 N 个橘子的最少天数

testcases.input: n = 10 Output: 4 Explanation: You have 10 oranges. Day 1: Eat 1 orange, 10 - 1 = 9. Day 2: Eat 6 oranges, 9 - 2*(9/3) = 9 - 6 = 3. (Since 9 is divisible by 3) Day 3: Eat 2 oranges, 3 - 2*(3/3) = 3 - 2 = 1. Day 4: Eat the last orange 1 - 1 = 0. You need at least 4 days to eat the 10 oranges.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: You have 10 oranges. Day 1: Eat 1 orange, 10 - 1 = 9. Day 2: Eat 6 oranges, 9 - 2*(9/3) = 9 - 6 = 3. (Since 9 is divisible by 3) Day 3: Eat 2 oranges, 3 - 2*(3/3) = 3 - 2 = 1. Day 4: Eat the last orange 1 - 1 = 0. You need at least 4 days to eat the 10 oranges.

testcases.input: n = 6 Output: 3 Explanation: You have 6 oranges. Day 1: Eat 3 oranges, 6 - 6/2 = 6 - 3 = 3. (Since 6 is divisible by 2). Day 2: Eat 2 oranges, 3 - 2*(3/3) = 3 - 2 = 1. (Since 3 is divisible by 3) Day 3: Eat the last orange 1 - 1 = 0. You need at least 3 days to eat the 6 oranges.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: You have 6 oranges. Day 1: Eat 3 oranges, 6 - 6/2 = 6 - 3 = 3. (Since 6 is divisible by 2). Day 2: Eat 2 oranges, 3 - 2*(3/3) = 3 - 2 = 1. (Since 3 is divisible by 3) Day 3: Eat the last orange 1 - 1 = 0. You need at least 3 days to eat the 6 oranges.
